---
title: "Template for Quarto slides"
description: |
  Boilerplate code to create Quarto presentations integrated with Github Actions.
date: 2023-12-10
# author: 
#   - name: Adriano Belisario
site-url: https://github.com/belisards/quarto_presentation
image: "cover.jpeg"
# image-alt: 
categories: [Quarto]
open-graph: false
draft: false
---

Boilerplate code for Quarto presentations integrated with GitHub Actions.

Code: [https://github.com/belisards/quarto_presentation](https://github.com/belisards/quarto_presentation)
